title: Savory Crunchy Indian Fava Beans Stir-fry with Freekeh and Fermented Vegetables
description: This kid-friendly Polish dish features a blend of fava beans, freekeh, fermented vegetables for a sour and dense texture, perfect as a light dinner or snack.
instructions: In a pot, cover fava beans with water, add a pinch of salt, and bring to boil. Reduce heat, simmer for about 20 minutes until soft.
Meanwhile, cook freekeh in boiling salted water according to package instructions but reduce the cooking time by half (around 15-20 minutes). Allow it to cool slightly.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté for about 3 minutes until translucent.
Add fava beans and lemon juice to the pan. Stir well with freekeh to combine all ingredients evenly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix gently.
Serve hot as a side dish or garnish it with fresh herbs if desired.
